title: Understanding Constructor Functions in JavaScript
author: Harini
summary:
In JavaScript, a constructor function is used to create multiple objects with similar properties and methods. Instead of creating objects manually again and again, we use a constructor to generate them easily.

What is an Object?

An object stores data in key–value pairs.

Example:

let person = {
  name: "Harini",
  age: 22
};

Here:

  • name and age are keys
  • "Harini" and 23 are values If we want to create many similar objects, writing this structure repeatedly is not
